title: lasianthus nervosus
intro: Lasianthus nervosus is a species of flowering plant in the family Theaceae, commonly known as the nervous lasiandra or nervous tea plant. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in digestion. Lasianthus nervosus can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the leaves in hot water, which is a popular method of consumption in some parts of the world.
